summary: Complete testing of Carteira Movel (Mobile Wallet) feature. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified and working correctly. Asaas integration is NOT configured (no API key) - all operations save locally to MongoDB.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

passed_tests: GET /api/carteira/config - returns {configured: false, environment: sandbox} - OK
GET /api/carteira/resumo - returns financial summary with cobrancas, assinaturas, financeiro sections - OK
POST /api/carteira/cobrancas - creates PIX cobranca with cliente_id, valor, vencimento - OK
GET /api/carteira/cobrancas - lists cobrancas with all fields - OK
GET /api/carteira/assinaturas - lists assinaturas with status and ciclo - OK
POST /api/webhooks/asaas - webhook endpoint accessible without auth, returns {received: true} - OK
POST /api/webhooks/asaas - handles empty payload gracefully - OK
Frontend: /carteira page loads with summary cards (Receita, Pendente, Vencido, Assinaturas) - OK
Frontend: Cobrancas table displays data correctly - OK
Frontend: 'Asaas Pendente' badge visible in yellow - OK
Frontend: 'Nova Cobranca' button opens modal with all fields - OK
Frontend: /assinaturas page loads with table and status filter - OK
Frontend: 'Nova Assinatura' button opens modal with Cliente, Tipo, Valor, Ciclo, Vencimento - OK
Frontend: Cancel assinatura button shows confirmation dialog - OK
Frontend: Sidebar includes 'Carteira Movel' and 'Assinaturas' links - OK
critical_code_review_comments: Asaas integration is properly structured but NOT configured (no ASAAS_API_KEY in .env)
All cobrancas and assinaturas are saved locally to MongoDB when Asaas is not configured
Webhook endpoint correctly does NOT require authentication (as expected for external webhooks)
Frontend correctly shows 'Asaas Pendente' badge when not configured
Modal shows warning 'Asaas nao configurado. A cobranca sera salva localmente.' when creating charges
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests (TEST_ prefixed cobrancas and assinaturas)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Carteira Movel feature fully implemented and tested. Asaas is NOT configured (no API key in .env). All operations save locally to MongoDB. Existing data: 1 cobranca (Joao Silva, PIX, R$39.99, PENDING), 3 assinaturas (2 CANCELLED, 1 ACTIVE). Webhook endpoint at POST /api/webhooks/asaas does NOT require auth. Frontend pages: /carteira (cobrancas + summary) and /assinaturas (subscriptions). Both pages have CRUD functionality via modals.

frontend_pages.carteira: /carteira - Summary cards + Cobrancas table + Nova Cobranca modal
frontend_pages.assinaturas: /assinaturas - Assinaturas table + Nova Assinatura modal + Cancel dialog

asaas_integration_status.behavior: All operations save locally to MongoDB without calling Asaas API
asaas_integration_status.frontend_indicator: Yellow 'Asaas Pendente' badge visible on /carteira page
